title: centaurea aristata subsp. exilis
intro: Centaurea aristata subsp. exilis, also known as a mountain helichrysum, is a flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in the treatment of various health issues, including wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Centaurea aristata subsp. exilis include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and promote wound healing. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in natural remedies for their medicinal properties.
